case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE VS TRAMMELL SABINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $676.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAMMELL SABINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-05-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
